products.title: The Creator's Soulbook
issues: CTA href is /soulbook/vault — no dedicated product page at /products/soulbook (uses /soulbook instead)

products.title: The Creative AI Toolkit
issues: NO delivery block in products.json — product has no downloadable files defined

Stripe price ID uses env var STRIPE_PRICE_TOOLKIT which may not be set

systemIssues.issue: Stripe checkout route only maps 3 products (creative-ai-toolkit, acos-creator-kit, suno-prompt-pack) but product slugs don't match — 'acos-creator-kit' and 'suno-prompt-pack' don't exist in products.json
systemIssues.impact: Stripe checkout is unreachable for ANY product in the catalog
systemIssues.fix: Update checkout route PRODUCTS map to match actual product slugs and add all paid products

systemIssues.issue: All paid products CTA to Gumroad, bypassing the Stripe checkout route entirely
systemIssues.impact: Stripe checkout route is dead code — all revenue flows through Gumroad with no delivery automation
systemIssues.fix: Either commit to Gumroad (remove Stripe route) or migrate CTAs to use /api/checkout

systemIssues.issue: lib/delivery.ts DELIVERY_CONFIG only covers 5 products but products.json has 16 products
systemIssues.impact: 11 products have no delivery configuration — generateProductEmailData() returns null for them
systemIssues.fix: Add all products with delivery blocks to DELIVERY_CONFIG

systemIssues.issue: lib/delivery.ts file references don't match products.json blobKeys
systemIssues.impact: Even configured products may deliver wrong files or fail

details.creative-ai-toolkit: delivery.ts: 'creative-ai-toolkit-v1.pdf' vs products.json: no delivery block
details.agentic-creator-os: delivery.ts: 3 files vs products.json: 4 files (missing ACOS-Product-Guide-v2.pdf)

systemIssues.issue: 6 book products require email (gated) but have no email delivery template
systemIssues.impact: Users provide email for gated download, get added to Resend audience, but receive no confirmation email with download link
systemIssues.fix: Create book download email template or reuse the productDeliveryEmail from email-templates.ts

systemIssues.issue: Inconsistent blob key namespacing — some use 'products/{slug}/' prefix, some use root-level keys
systemIssues.impact: Files may not be found in blob storage if uploaded under different paths

systemIssues.issue: golden-age product uses different schema (title vs name, price vs offer.primaryPrice)
systemIssues.impact: Dynamic product page may render incorrectly or miss fields
systemIssues.fix: Normalize golden-age entry to match standard product schema

systemIssues.issue: Welcome email references /products/5-suno-prompts and /gencreator — URLs that may not have dedicated pages
systemIssues.fix: Verify all email template URLs resolve to valid pages

systemIssues.issue: Download API (GET /api/download) correctly blocks gated products and requires POST with email
File download API (/api/download/file?key=) provides an unprotected direct blob redirect
systemIssues.impact: Anyone with a blob key can download files — acceptable for free products, problematic for paid

recommendations: P0: Decide on Gumroad vs Stripe and make ONE work end-to-end for all paid products
P0: Fix creative-ai-toolkit and creation-chronicles — paid products with zero delivery pipeline
P1: Sync lib/delivery.ts DELIVERY_CONFIG with products.json — all 16 products should be registered
P1: Add email delivery templates for book downloads (6 products need this)
P1: Fix blob key namespacing — standardize on products/{slug}/ prefix for all product files
P2: Normalize golden-age product schema to match other products
P2: Verify all blob files actually exist in Vercel Blob storage (cannot verify without runtime access)
P3: Consider access protection for paid product files — current /api/download/file endpoint is unprotected
